description: These slip-on kitten heels from catwalk are perfect for party wear & ndash the golden glitter on the straps and fan-shaped cutouts will complement any party dress or ethnic party ensemble. Pop these on to jazz up your outfit when you're dressing to impress.UpperGlitter covered strap covering the forefoot for a snug Fit and great visual appealShiny gold sole for added style OutsoleTPU outsole with high-shine kitten heelSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
